articles.title: Will President Trump send ICE agents to Boston’s Logan Airport?
articles.description:
“We have not heard anything official from TSA leadership that ICE would be coming to any airport in New England."

The post Will President Trump send ICE agents to Boston’s Logan Airport? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: TSA has not confirmed any ICE presence at Logan Airport in Boston.
No official announcements from TSA leadership regarding ICE deployment in New England.
Potential ICE operations could affect Boston residents traveling through Logan Airport.
